name: AZD0947
description: AZD0947 is a K+ channel opener, which was under investigation by AstraZeneca for the treatment of overactive bladder. As of March 2003, the drug was in phase II trials; however, as of October 2004, it no longer appeared on the company’s development pipeline.
indication: Intended for the treatment of urinary incontinence.
pharmacodynamics: AZD0947 is a K<sup>+</sup> channel opener.
